conventions.delta: frameDelta a b = [(pos, new)] at positions where a and b differ, ascending; applyDelta a (frameDelta a b) == b EXACTLY (BA5); churn = list length
conventions.patchMajor: the fractal record's ordering: patch (v,u) outer row-major, inner (j,i) row-major - H2/PatchGrid; pos = (v*16+u)*256 + (j*16+i) on the 256x256 ceiling
conventions.homeShare: homeShare = (1/256) * sum over patches p of the share of patch p's pixels equal to p on the (16x16)x(16x16) ceiling (H laws) = own/65536 — power-of-two denominator, so the expected f64 is EXACT; the index frame is regenerated counts-free from the baLcg convention: idx_k = (s_k div 65536) mod 256 row-major, s_{k+1} = s_k*6364136223846793005 + 1442695040888963407, s_0 = seed, Haskell Integer (never wraps); the extracted byte is bits 16..23 of a positive s, which depend only on the low 64 bits — wrapping-u64 regeneration is exactly equivalent
